title: ToDo Website
summary: A responsive todo list web application built to improve task organization and productivity. It allows users to create, update, and delete tasks through a simple and intuitive interface. The project focuses on clean UI design, efficient state handling, and user-friendly interaction to demonstrate practical front-end development skills.
content: A responsive todo list web application built to improve task organization and productivity. It allows users to create, update, and delete tasks through a simple and intuitive interface. The project focuses on clean UI design, efficient state handling, and user-friendly interaction to demonstrate practical front-end development skills.
